title: Acme Guided Tour
tagline: A 3D guide walks you through every feature, live, on the real site.

tracks.title: Quick highlights
tracks.description: The best of every chapter, in a few minutes.

sections.title: Overview
sections.intro: Welcome — I'm your guide. Let me show you around, starting at the front door.

sections.title: Build
sections.intro: Now the fun part — let's look at what you can make here.

stops.title: Home
stops.narration: Here we have the home page — the front door to everything Acme does. Start a new project right from here.
stops.sectionIntro: Welcome — I'm your guide. Let me show you around, starting at the front door.

stops.title: Pricing
stops.narration: Next up, pricing. Simple, transparent plans that scale with your team.

stops.title: Docs
stops.narration: This is the documentation — guides, references, and tutorials whenever you want to go deeper.

stops.title: Studio
stops.narration: Meet the Studio — where you actually build. Everything you create starts on this canvas.
stops.sectionIntro: Now the fun part — let's look at what you can make here.

stops.title: Deploy
stops.narration: And this — deploy. One click ships what you built to the world.
